title: Capsule Life
description: A modpack that mixes Cobblemon with its many add-ons, agriculture-oriented and adventure-oriented mods, while keeping everything Vanilla friendly.
body:
This Modpack contains **everything** you need to live your new **Cobblemon** experience with the best mix of **exploration**, **agriculture** and **decoration**.

[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), as the **core mod**, with its best **add-ons** (such as [Legends & Myths](https://modrinth.com/mod/legends-myths), [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown), [Rider](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5), [Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav), [Shearems](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shearems) and many quality of life) at your service to let you begin your new life as a **Pokémon Trainer**.

[Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), along with [Rustic Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/rusticdelight-refabricated), [Seed Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/seed-delight), [More Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-delight), even [Cobblecuisine Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblecuisine-delight) and many more, to spice up your **agricultural life**.

[Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture), [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-fences-and-walls), [Macaw's Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-doors), [Macaw's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges), [Macaw's Lights and Lamps](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-lights-and-lamps), [Macaw's Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-paintings), [Macaw's Paths and Pavings](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-paths-and-pavings), [Macaw's Roofs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-roofs), [Macaw's Stairs](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-stairs), [Macaw's Trapdoors](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-trapdoors) and [Macaw's Windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-windows) to let you be the very best as an **Interior** and **Exterior** **Design**, while training your Pocket Monsters.

[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) to **reshape** your **world** in a new beautiful way, totally **compatible** with **Cobblemon** spawns and **every structure recreated** by [YUNG](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api), from **Mineshafts** to **Nether Fortresses**, and the **new ones** added by [Formations](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations).

[You Shall Not Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/you-shall-not-spawn) to _prevent Vanilla mobs from spawning_. It's a faithful Pokémon adventure, there's no space for **Sheeps** and **Cows** when you can catch **Flaffy** and **Miltank** [_the path to the end of the game, including the Ender Dragon, is still work in progress_].

**EVERY** big **optimization** and **quality of life** mod that _I don't have the spirit to list right now_, **Minimap**, **Storage**, **FPS**, **Third Person**, **Animations** and _bla bla bla_.
